gate_rule: A-v3 rev2 T0 must use gold-blind iterative LLM re-querying plus content-reading listwise rerank, produce new corpus candidates, and have positive F1 delta vs frozen A-v2 on train/holdout/test with bootstrap CI lower bound > 0.

sample.selection: deterministic sha256(query_id|m090-rev2-t0), split-stratified, not selected by gold or metric quality
